parameters.jsCode:
const event = ($json.body && typeof $json.body === 'object') ? $json.body : $json;

// Friendly flag summary: turn [{code,message},...] into readable text
function friendlyFlags(flags) {
  if (!Array.isArray(flags) || !flags.length) return '';
  return flags.map(f => f.code ? `${f.code}: ${f.message || ''}` : String(f)).join(' | ');
}

const row = {
  'Timestamp':           event.timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
  'Session ID':          event.sessionId || '',
  'Record Kind':         event.recordKind || '',
  'Flow':                event.flow || '',
  'Attempt #':           event.attemptNumber || '',
  'Result':              event.resultStatus || '',
  'Side':                event.side || '',
  'First Name':          event.profile?.legalFirstName || event.profile?.firstName || '',
  'Last Name':           event.profile?.legalLastName || event.profile?.lastName || '',
  'Date of Birth':       event.profile?.dateOfBirth || '',
  'Email':               event.profile?.email || '',
  'Phone':               event.profile?.phone || '',
  'Doc Type (Selected)': event.selectedDocumentType || '',
  'I-9 List':            event.selectedList || '',
  'Doc ID':              event.selectedDocumentId || '',
  'Doc Label':           event.selectedDocumentLabel || '',
  'Immigration Status':  event.immigrationStatus || event.i9?.citizenshipStatus || '',
  'Document Path':       event.documentPath || event.i9?.documentPath || '',
  'Drive File ID':       event.googleDriveFileId || '',
  'Drive File URL':      event.googleDriveFileUrl || '',
  'User Message':        event.userMessage || '',
  'Flags (JSON)':        friendlyFlags(event.flags),
  'ID Final Status':     event.identity?.finalStatus || '',
  'ID Attempt Count':    event.identity?.attemptCount || '',
  'ID Drive Links':      (event.identity?.driveLinks || []).join('\n'),
  'I-9 Final Status':    event.i9?.finalStatus || '',
  'I-9 Attempt Count':   event.i9?.attemptCount || '',
  'I-9 Drive Links':     (event.i9?.driveLinks || []).join('\n'),
  'I-9 Selected Docs':   (event.i9?.selectedDocuments || []).join(', '),
  'Rating (1\u20135)':   event.feedback?.rating || '',
  'Feedback Comments':   event.feedback?.comments || ''
};
return [{ json: row }];

nodes.name: Append Audit Row To Google Sheets

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { logged: true, sessionId: $('Normalize Audit Row').item.json.sessionId, recordKind: $('Normalize Audit Row').item.json.recordKind } }}

main.node: Append Audit Row To Google Sheets
